hooks.command: if [ -f Package.swift ]; then BUILD_OUT=$(swift build 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BUILD FAILED — fix before continuing:'; echo "$BUILD_OUT" | grep -E '(error:|warning:)' | head -10; exit 1; else echo 'Build OK'; fi; elif XCPROJ=$(ls -d *.xcodeproj 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -n "$XCPROJ" ]; then SCHEME="${XCPROJ%.xcodeproj}"; BUILD_OUT=$(xcodebuild build -project "$XCPROJ" -scheme "$SCHEME" -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -quiet 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo 'BUILD FAILED — fix before continuing:'; echo "$BUILD_OUT" | grep -E '(error:|warning:)' | head -10; exit 1; else echo 'Build OK'; fi; fi
hooks.description: Build after edits — auto-detects SPM or Xcode project
Block stop and re-inject next task until all features pass
